generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position and angular velocity for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder providing redundant position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor measuring angular position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor measuring angular velocity of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor measuring angular acceleration of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance PositionSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
]

instance VelocitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

instance AccelerationSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkCoulombViscous, SimulinkStribeck, SimulinkDahl, SimulinkLuGre
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data trace from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data trace from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data trace from the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocitySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscous : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction simulation model in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeck : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction simulation model in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahl : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction simulation model in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGre : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction simulation model in MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data integration in the Digital Twin of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data integration in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data transmission in the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for displaying friction parameters and robot motion data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameter, KineticFrictionParameter, ViscousFrictionParameter
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction parameters and robot motion data in dashboard for the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameter, KineticFrictionParameter, ViscousFrictionParameter
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for improving robot motion accuracy through friction model refinement in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ImprovedControlAlgorithms
]

instance StaticFrictionParameter : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction parameter identified for model refinement in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameter : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction parameter identified for model refinement in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameter : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction parameter identified for model refinement in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
]

instance ImprovedControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Improved control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy in the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot used for studying joint friction during operation"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization with live measurements; specific sampling rates not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of the physical MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox), sensors, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), SysML and Simulink models, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard for unified visualization and friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as-operated), with continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
